title: Data-Driven Wave Game
genericDescription: Store gameplay parameters outside core logic; build content from structured data; enable rapid balancing.
specificDescription: Build a survival, rhythm, tower defense, or encounter game where waves, enemies, items, or events are loaded from JSON, CSV, scriptable objects, resources, or equivalent data assets. Include at least six authored waves.
gradingRubric: 30 pts data-driven architecture; 20 pts content variety; 20 pts balancing and pacing; 15 pts designer usability; 15 pts documentation.
